title: SPP Fuel Mix By BAA CSV download
description:
Fuel mix for SPP, with a BAA column to view SPP East and SPP West fuel mix values independently. 

Data begins on March 30th, 2026 for SPP, April 1st, 2026 for SWPW.

Combined all-SPP fuel mix data with further historical data is available from the `spp_fuel_mix` [dataset](https://www.gridstatus.io/datasets/spp_fuel_mix).
